Module com.trifasico.x50zo
Package com.trifasico.x50zo.model

Class Deck

java.lang.Object
com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Represents the draw pile (deck) of cards in a Cincuentazo game.

Internally backed by a LinkedList — the first of the three required non-array data structures — because the deck is used exclusively as a queue: cards are added to the tail (reshuffle) and drawn from the head, making LinkedList the natural fit over ArrayList.

Responsibilities:

  • Build and hold a standard 52-card deck.
  • Shuffle itself into a random order.
  • Deal one card at a time from the top.
  • Accept cards from a table pile and reshuffle them into a new deck when the draw pile runs out.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Yostin Ramirez, Lesly Zapata, Joseph Terreros
See Also:
  • Card
  • EmptyDeckException

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck()
    Constructs a full, shuffled 52-card deck ready for dealing.

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      Constructs a full, shuffled 52-card deck ready for dealing.

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public Card draw() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draws the top card from the deck.

      If the deck is empty this method throws EmptyDeckException. The caller should first try to reshuffle the table pile via reshuffleFromPile(List) before drawing.

      Returns:
      the top Card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - (checked) if the deck is empty

    • reshuffleFromPile

      public void reshuffleFromPile(List<Card> pileCards) throws EmptyDeckException
      Takes the given list of cards (the table pile minus its top card), shuffles them, and loads them as the new draw pile.

      Called automatically by the game engine when the deck runs out. The table sum is not affected by this operation.

      Parameters:
      pileCards - the cards to reshuffle; must contain at least one card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - (checked) if pileCards is empty

    • addToBottom

      public void addToBottom(Card card)
      Adds a single card to the bottom of the deck.

      Used when a player is eliminated: their hand cards are sent to the back of the draw pile and become available for future draws.

      Parameters:
      card - the card to add; must not be null
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if card is null

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if there are no cards left in the deck.
      Returns:
      true when empty

    • remainingCards

      public int remainingCards()
      Returns the number of cards currently remaining in the deck.
      Returns:
      remaining card count (0 or more)

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle()
      Shuffles the deck into a new random order without changing its contents. Can be called at any time (e.g. for testing with a known seed via a seeded Random if needed in future).
